creator: sven.a.jonsson@bahnhof.se
text:
I just found https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/832 .
I have CCACHE_DIR_NON_ROOT_SAFE=yes configured, and it has worked.
I guess that if has worked previously I must have had non-default access on root directory.

So I guess my options are chmod on root or build as root if I'm to use ccache?
